//: XppAtlas MCP server connection for this project. Adjust `command` and `cwd` to point at your local XppAtlas checkout. The stdio transport is used by Claude Code, Codex, VS Code MCP client, and similar tools.

servers.//xppatlas-http: Uncomment when you have a XppAtlas Standard Server on your LAN. Connects over Streamable HTTP to the /mcp endpoint.
